resources.string: .cia — original CIA package, decrypted in place. Safest for emulator install.
.cci — raw NCSD cartridge image. Smaller file; only valid for game CIAs.
.3ds — same NCSD bytes as .cci, with the extension some emulators expect.
No .cia or .3ds files found in this folder.
Open-source on-device decryptor for Nintendo 3DS .cia and .3ds files.
Built on ctrtool and makerom by 3DSGuy/Project_CTR (MIT). seeddb.bin maintained by ihavamac. Original Windows tool by matiffeder; redux by xxmichibxx.

cia3ds-android is released under the MIT License. You are free to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute, sublicense, and sell copies of the Software, provided the copyright notice and this permission notice appear in all copies. The software is provided \"as is\" with no warranty.

• libtoolchain, libfmt, libnintendo-n3ds, libbroadon-es — MIT
• libblz, libyaml — permissive (MIT-style)

• Bundled seeddb.bin — community-maintained (ihavamac and contributors)
